## Documentation Task

**Type**: Guide / Cookbook / Tutorial / API Docs / Video
**Estimated Time**: X hours/days
**From**: [GAPS.md - Documentation Gaps](../../../GAPS.md#documentation-gaps)

## What Needs to Be Documented

<!-- Clear description of the documentation need -->

## Target Audience

- [ ] New users (getting started)
- [ ] Grammar authors
- [ ] Contributors
- [ ] Advanced users (performance tuning, etc.)

## Deliverables

**File**: `docs/FILE_NAME.md` (or specify location)

**Content Should Include**:
- [ ] Introduction/Overview
- [ ] Step-by-step guide or examples
- [ ] Code samples (tested and working)
- [ ] Common pitfalls / troubleshooting
- [ ] Links to related documentation

## Structure Template

```markdown
# Title

## Overview
Brief introduction

## Prerequisites
What readers should know before starting

## Step-by-Step Guide
1. Step 1 with code example
2. Step 2 with code example
...

## Examples
Complete working examples

## Troubleshooting
Common issues and solutions

## Related Documentation
Links to related guides
```

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Documentation is clear and easy to follow
- [ ] All code examples are tested and work
- [ ] Follows Diataxis framework (if applicable)
- [ ] Links to related documentation are included
- [ ] Added to `docs/README.md` index
- [ ] No spelling or grammar errors

## Examples to Reference

<!-- Link to similar docs or examples for style guidance -->

## Resources

- [Diataxis Documentation Framework](https://diataxis.fr/)
- [Existing Documentation](../../../docs/)
- [Writing Guide](../../../CONTRIBUTING.md#documentation)
